claimRefund(uint256).notice: Claim refund after expiry. Anyone may call.

complete(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Complete job. Evaluator only when Submitted. Releases escrow to provider.

createJob(address,address,uint256,string.notice: Create a job. Provider MAY be zero (set later via setProvider).

fund(uint256,uint256,bytes).notice: Fund the job escrow. Client only. Moves Open → Funded.

reject(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Reject job. Client when Open; evaluator when Funded or Submitted. Refunds client.

setBudget(uint256,uint256,bytes).notice: Set or negotiate budget. Client or provider.

setProvider(uint256,address,bytes).notice: Set provider on a job created with provider=0. Client only.

submit(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Submit deliverable. Provider only. Moves Funded → Submitted.
